Container.Name: meeting-diarizer
Container.Overview: Speaker-diarized transcription service combining faster-whisper and pyannote. GPU required.

Config.Name: Data Path
Config.Description: Stores model cache and speaker enrollment embeddings

Config.Name: HF_TOKEN
Config.Description: HuggingFace access token — required to download pyannote models

Config.Name: WHISPER_MODEL
Config.Description: Whisper model size: tiny / base / small / medium / large-v3

Config.Name: DATA_DIR
Config.Description: Internal container data path — do not change
